untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern detection requires shape/geometric analysis not available in indicator set. Pattern formation, trend line identification, and breakout detection cannot be expressed with standard OHLCV indicators. Success rates (bull/bear), target price computation, and average move percentages marked AUTHOR_SILENT are not translatable. The signal relies on visual pattern recognition rather than quantitative thresholds.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used pivot + volume surge as entry signal (breakout context), with support (s1) and resistance (r1) levels as stop/target references. Hold period set to 13 days (upper range of throwback/pullback duration 9-13 days). Stop loss 5% represents typical diamond volatility. This is a lossy approximation—the true signal requires pattern-matching capability not available in the indicator library.
